name: Epic Games Profile
description: Shows an Epic Games profile card with display name, account id, linked platforms, creator code, and editable profile details.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.profileMap:
Akash=Akashsuu|epic-00000000000000000000000000000000|India|PC, PlayStation|Public|AKASH|Fortnite, Rocket League
Hunter=GhostHunter|epic-11111111111111111111111111111111|United States|PC, Xbox|Friends Only|HUNTER|Fall Guys, Rocket League
defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Account**
Display Name: `{epic_name}`
Account ID: `{account_id}`
Country: `{country}`
Privacy: `{privacy}`
Creator Code: `{creator_code}`

**Linked Platforms**
{linked_platforms}

**Games**
{games}

**Links**
Profile: {profile_link}
defaults.notFoundMessage: No Epic Games profile saved or found for `{query}`. Add it in the Epic Games Profile node map.
defaults.errorMessage: Could not load Epic Games profile: {error}
